reasoning: Despite a high composite fidelity score, a major defect (C5) was flagged regarding the omission of critical map metadata including scale, spatial reference, and status date. In very short documents (baseline 4 words), the omission of technical metadata represents a significant loss of information density and accuracy, necessitating human verification.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: The output omits the metadata found at the bottom of the source document, including the map scale and spatial reference information. Specifically, 'Scale: 1:3,179,372', '1 inch equals 50 miles', 'Spatial Reference Name: NAD 1983 StatePlane North Carolina FIPS 3200 Feet', and 'Status as of: 6/16/2025' (bottom right instance) are missing. This missing text accounts for approximately 40% of the total textual information on the page, exceeding the 25% threshold for a major defect.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Scale: 1:3,179,372, 1 inch equals 50 miles, Spatial Reference Name: NAD 1983 StatePlane North Carolina FIPS 3200 Feet, Status as of: 6/16/2025
concerns.output_quote: [Information completely missing from JSON text and alt text]
concerns.location: Bottom footer area of the page

action_items: Verify the inclusion of the footer metadata found on the source map graphic.
Check if the spatial reference information and scale were correctly captured in the alt text or surrounding HTML content.
